name: Karthik Sai Vellanki
bio: Telugu comedy creator with 1.2M YouTube subscribers and a highly engaged Instagram following. Known for sketch comedy and cultural commentary on Telugu millennial life. Have crossed to screen in 2 AHA web series as a supporting actor. Looking to expand into lead roles.

education_training.name: Self-taught filmmaking and editing via YouTube

name: Preethi Reddy Annavarapu
bio: Telugu beauty and lifestyle creator with 850K Instagram followers and a loyal YouTube community. South India's most followed Telugu beauty creator in the 22-30 age segment. Regular on-screen presence in brand films for NYKAA, L'Oreal India, and Myntra. Looking for acting roles beyond brand content.

name: Venkata Siva Sankar Pulipati
bio: Telugu-language tech YouTuber with 2.4M subscribers making tech accessible to non-English audiences across Andhra and Telangana. Reviews gadgets, explains tech in simple Telugu, and covers startup news. Have hosted 3 Samsung India product launch events. Open to hosting and corporate video work.

name: Swapna Latha Komuravelli
bio: Vijayawada-based Telugu food creator focused on traditional Andhra recipes and coastal seafood. 180K Instagram followers and growing fast. Content bridges traditional home cooking with modern presentation. Looking for food brand partnerships and cooking show hosting opportunities.

education_training.name: BSc Home Science — Acharya Nagarjuna University

name: Naga Teja Manthena
bio: Hyderabad fitness creator with 620K Instagram followers and a strong presence across YouTube and Moj. Calisthenics specialist and certified personal trainer. Have appeared in 3 fitness brand TVCs as on-screen talent. Physically capable for action roles and comfortable on camera.

name: Anusha Varma Datla
bio: Telugu travel creator documenting South India's hidden destinations with a cinematic eye. 290K Instagram followers with a reputation for stunning visual storytelling. Work has been featured by Telangana Tourism and Karnataka Tourism. Increasingly interested in hosting travel documentary formats.

education_training.name: BA Visual Communication — Hyderabad Central University

name: Rohith Chandra Pasam

primary_craft.subcraft: Telugu Film and Entertainment Podcast Host

bio: Host of 'Cinemaa Maatalu', Telugu's most popular film podcast with 180K Spotify listeners and 320K YouTube subscribers. Have interviewed over 60 Telugu film personalities including directors, actors, and technicians. Known for deep-dive analytical conversations rather than promotional chat.

name: Divya Sree Kalavala
bio: Vizag-based fashion creator just starting out. 62K Instagram followers after 14 months of posting. Content focuses on affordable Indian fashion and how to style traditional South Indian outfits for modern occasions. Looking for my first paid brand collaboration and open to small acting or modelling work.

name: Sumanth Reddy Chavali
bio: Telugu finance creator making stock markets and personal finance accessible to Telugu audiences. 940K YouTube subscribers. Have partnered with Zerodha, Groww, and Angel One. Regular speaker at startup events. Looking for fintech platform deals and corporate finance education content projects.

name: Bhavani Sri Yarlagadda
bio: Kurnool-based creator making educational content in Rayalaseema Telugu dialect. Explains government schemes, exam preparation, and career guidance for rural AP youth. 120K YouTube subscribers, mostly from Tier 2 and Tier 3 Andhra towns. First in family to create content professionally.

education_training.name: BA Telugu Literature — Sri Krishnadevaraya University

name: Rakesh Varma Boddu
bio: Telugu auto and motorsports creator with 1.1M YouTube subscribers. Reviews cars and bikes in Telugu, covers Formula 1, MotoGP, and Indian Rally Championship. Have been credentialed press at 3 Formula E rounds. Only Telugu creator with consistent motorsports coverage at this scale.

name: Mounika Reddy Palleti
bio: Telugu mental health awareness creator bridging psychology with everyday language for South Indian audiences. 380K Instagram followers. Certified counsellor. Have been featured in The News Minute, Banega Swasth India, and collaborated with iCall. Making mental health conversations normal in Telugu communities.

name: Aakash Narayana Chebrolu
bio: Warangal-based Telugu gaming creator streaming BGMI and GTA on YouTube and Loco. 55K subscribers in 18 months. Growing fastest in Tier 2 Telangana with a highly engaged young audience. First Telugu gaming creator from Warangal to reach 50K. Looking for my first gaming peripheral sponsorship.

name: Sravanthi Nair Pullela
bio: Kuchipudi and Bharatanatyam trained dancer turned content creator. 410K Instagram followers combining classical Indian dance with contemporary expression. Have performed at Kalakshetra and Hyderabad's Ravindra Bharathi stage. Creating content that bridges classical arts and younger audiences.

name: Harish Kumar Sunkara
bio: Telugu motivational creator making self-development content for students and working professionals. 155K YouTube subscribers in 2 years. Content covers productivity, morning routines, and career mindset. Heavily inspired by Telugu professionals who made it from small-town backgrounds.

audience_demographics.primary_geo: Andhra Pradesh and Telangana, Tier 2 cities

name: Ramya Sri Velamuri
bio: Telugu-Tamil bilingual parenting creator documenting honest family life with 440K Instagram followers. Known for debunking parenting myths in South Indian cultural contexts and advocating for gentle parenting in Telugu households. Partner of choice for Johnson & Johnson, Pampers, and Himalaya baby.

audience_demographics.primary_geo: South India, particularly Telugu and Tamil families

name: Naveen Krishna Jagarlapudi
bio: Host of 'Founder Gari Vishayam', Telugu's first startup and entrepreneurship podcast with 95K Spotify listeners. Interviews Telugu founders building from Hyderabad and Amaravati. Have spoken at T-Hub, NSRCEL IIM Bangalore, and IIIT Hyderabad entrepreneurship summit.

audience_demographics.primary_geo: Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Indian startup ecosystem

name: Tejaswini Devi Kandula
bio: Telugu BookTok and BookTube creator making Telugu and English literature accessible. 88K Instagram followers and a highly engaged literary community. Run Hyderabad's most active Telugu reader community online with 12K members. Looking to expand into Telugu literary event hosting.

name: Sai Charan Maguluri
bio: Telugu roast and commentary creator with 1.8M YouTube subscribers. Known for sharp political satire and Tollywood film roasts. Have crossed into standup comedy performing at 3 sold-out Hyderabad shows. Looking for acting opportunities in comedy web series and OTT specials.

audience_demographics.primary_geo: Andhra Pradesh and Telangana, urban youth

name: Sailaja Kumari Boddupalli
bio: Telugu skincare educator combining dermatology training with creator skills. 260K Instagram followers. Content debunks skincare myths common in South Indian households and recommends evidence-based approaches. Recently featured in Health Shots and Femina India.

name: Manoj Kumar Thota
bio: Telugu sports creator covering cricket, kabaddi, and kho-kho in Telugu. 560K YouTube subscribers. Exclusively covers Indian sports from a Telugu perspective with deep analytical commentary. Have done official commentary for 2 PKL matches on Fan TV. Seeking broadcast commentary opportunities.

education_training.name: BA Physical Education — Acharya Nagarjuna University

name: Pooja Lakshmi Gedela
bio: Hyderabad's first Telugu eco and sustainable living creator. 45K Instagram followers documenting zero-waste lifestyle in a Telugu household. Very early but growing fast in a niche almost entirely ignored in Telugu content. Looking for first paid partnership with an Indian eco or sustainable brand.

name: Venkatesh Naidu Karthikeyan

primary_craft.subcraft: True Crime and Investigation Podcast Host

bio: Host of 'Nija Kathalu', a Telugu true crime podcast with 160K Spotify listeners making it the most listened-to Telugu true crime content. Deeply researched episodes on unsolved South Indian cases. Now actively looking to host Telugu crime docuseries formats for OTT.

name: Sindhu Priya Vaddeboina
bio: College student creator from Karimnagar documenting engineering student life in small-town Telangana. 38K Instagram followers, very relatable content about JEE stress, hostel life, and first-gen college experiences. Young but growing fast in an underserved niche.

name: Rajesh Narayana Uppala
bio: Telugu short-drama content creator who produces and acts in mini-series on YouTube. 680K subscribers. Known for emotionally resonant 10-15 minute drama episodes addressing middle-class Telugu family issues. Have crossed to screen with a supporting role in a ZEE5 Telugu series.

name: Kavitha Naga Parvathi Koneru
bio: Telugu wedding and events content creator with 210K Instagram followers. Cover Telugu and Kannada weddings across South India with a cinematic visual style. Have worked with WeddingWire India, Shaadi.com, and Tanishq for branded wedding content campaigns.

name: Dinesh Babu Gangavarapu
bio: Vizag-based Telugu political satire creator with 340K YouTube subscribers. Known for fair-handed AP and Telangana political commentary delivered in sharp satirical style. Covered 2024 state elections extensively. Have been cited in The Hindu and Deccan Chronicle digital editions.

name: Varsha Sri Rayaprolu
bio: Telugu illustrator and visual artist whose work celebrates Telugu folklore, mythology, and cultural motifs in contemporary graphic styles. 95K Instagram followers. Have been commissioned for murals by Hyderabad Metro Rail Limited and illustrated for Penguin India Telugu's children's titles.

education_training.name: BFA Visual Communication — Jawaharlal Nehru Architecture and Fine Arts University

name: Suresh Goud Mudhiraj
bio: Telugu history and heritage podcast host with 75K Spotify listeners. Covers untold stories from Telugu and Deccan history including the Kakatiya empire, Satavahana dynasty, and Nizam era. Have collaborated with the Hyderabad Heritage Trust and Archaeological Survey of India on content.

name: Keerthi Lakshmi Pidugu
bio: Hyderabad college student making Telugu Reels about everyday city life — street food, local slang, college moments. 28K Instagram followers after 8 months. Very authentic and raw style that resonates with Hyderabadi youth. Just starting out, learning every day.

name: Prashanth Reddy Neredimalli
bio: Telugu reaction and commentary creator with 1.5M YouTube subscribers. Reaction content focused on Tollywood trailers, music launches, and Telugu pop culture moments. Extremely high engagement — comments often drive actual social conversations about the films being reacted to. Looking for acting opportunities.

name: Annapurna Devi Vanapalli
bio: Telugu devotional and spiritual content creator with 320K YouTube subscribers. Covers Telugu pujas, festivals, temple stories, and Vedic traditions in accessible modern language. Content reaches Telugu diaspora globally. Have partnered with Siddha Peetham Trust and Sri Venkateswara temple trust.

audience_demographics.primary_geo: South India and Telugu diaspora globally

name: Siddharth Rao Gonugunta
bio: Hyderabad photographer and visual content creator with a cinematic documentary style. 72K Instagram followers. Primarily shoots urban Hyderabad street photography and South Indian cultural events. Transitioning from hobbyist to professional — looking for paid photography and brand content work.

education_training.name: Documentary Photography Masterclass — India Photo Festival Hyderabad

name: Pavithra Kumari Bobbala
bio: Guntur-based creator documenting Andhra agriculture, chilli farming, and rural village life with genuine insider access. 52K YouTube subscribers mostly from rural AP. Content bridges urban and rural Telugu worlds. A unique creator in a niche with almost no competition.

education_training.name: BSc Agriculture — Acharya NG Ranga Agricultural University

name: Chandra Sekhar Gannavarapu
bio: Daily Telugu vlogger documenting authentic Hyderabad life — food, culture, events, people. 720K YouTube subscribers with a loyal long-term audience. Content has a strong journalistic quality that makes it stand out from entertainment-first vloggers. Have interviewed prominent Hyderabad personalities.

name: Lakshmi Priya Siripuram
bio: Telugu career and women empowerment creator documenting real stories of women breaking barriers in Telugu households and workplaces. 195K Instagram followers. Have been featured by LinkedIn India, Women Who Lead India, and Sheroes. Corporate speaking work at Cognizant Hyderabad and Infosys Hyderabad.

name: Kishore Babu Vemula
bio: Hyderabad food creator focused on Telugu cuisine, Hyderabadi street food, and restaurant reviews. 480K YouTube subscribers. Known for finding hidden gem dhabas and local eateries overlooked by mainstream food media. Have been featured in Zomato's content partner program.

name: Sirisha Devi Koneti
bio: Tirupati-based creator documenting Tirumala, Tirupati temples, and Rayalaseema pilgrimage routes. 42K YouTube subscribers with growing overseas Telugu audience. Very niche but deeply passionate creator in a space that has real search demand and minimal competition.

audience_demographics.primary_geo: South India and Telugu diaspora globally

education_training.name: BA Tourism Management — Sri Venkateswara University Tirupati

name: Aravind Reddy Kalluri
bio: Telugu OTT and film review creator with 840K YouTube subscribers. Deep-dive reviews of Telugu, Tamil, and Hindi cinema with critical analysis beyond typical promotional content. Have been invited as jury member for 2 regional film festivals. Looking for entertainment media and hosting opportunities.

audience_demographics.primary_geo: South India and cinema enthusiasts nationally

education_training.name: MA Film Studies — University of Hyderabad

name: Deepthi Sree Matlapudi
bio: Telugu unboxing and honest product review creator just starting out. 34K YouTube subscribers in 10 months. Covers gadgets, beauty products, and fashion hauls in Telugu. What's different: genuinely honest reviews including negatives, which has built a trusting audience fast.
